provenance.source: Hand-authored for toolcall-repair-bench; models the markdown_fenced_json failure shape common to small local models.

request_tools.name: run_sql_query
request_tools.description: Run a read-only SQL query against the analytics database.

arguments.sql: SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE active = 1

note: The call is wrapped in a ```tool_code fence rather than a json fence; stripping the fence yields a complete run_sql_query JSON object with sql and limit copied verbatim.
